body.title: ReaderDevice: shell + summary output mode (exec/detail/chunks)
body.result: ReaderDevice + chunk_text + 17 tests; summary mode ships format=summary → {exec,detail,chunks}
body.description:
Wire the URI resolver + blob cache (T-reader-uri-resolver) into a BaseDevice shell and implement summary output mode, migrating SummarizerDevice's chunker and LLM summarization logic.

ReaderDevice.read(uri, format='summary') → {exec: str, detail: str, chunks: list[str]}. Same exec/detail/chunks contract as SummarizerDevice. Chunker extracted from devices/summarizer/device.py._chunk_text() into devices/reader/chunker.py (shared by both output modes). LLM summarization via InferenceDevice (same path as SummarizerDevice). SummarizerDevice NOT retired yet — gate retirement on ReaderDevice proven in production.

**Affected files:** devices/reader/device.py (new — ReaderDevice(BaseDevice)), devices/reader/chunker.py (new — extracted from SummarizerDevice), devices/reader/__init__.py (update)
**Design rules:** BaseDevice inheritance required; no-sqlite; inference via InferenceDevice not direct API calls
**Scope boundary:** summary mode only; does not modify SummarizerDevice; no node extraction yet
**Test plan:** read('https://...', format='summary') with mocked fetch → exec/detail/chunks present and non-empty; read('file:///...', format='summary') → same; chunk boundaries respected at paragraph boundaries
